evidence: Composio card visible on Integrations page as 17th card with 'MCP Tools' category (screenshot: composio-card-visible.png)
Configure dialog shows Consumer Key, MCP Server URL, Composio Tools section (screenshot: composio-config-dialog.png)
Entered test consumer key — MCP fetch failed as expected, well-known tools fallback activated with 20 tools (screenshot: composio-tools-fallback.png)
Selected GMAIL_SEND_EMAIL, SLACK_SEND_MESSAGE, GITHUB_CREATE_ISSUE from company-level catalog
Saved config to DB: integrations row enabled with credential and 3 selected tools (GMAIL_SEND_EMAIL, SLACK_SEND_MESSAGE, GITHUB_CREATE_ISSUE)
Created OpenClaw Gateway agent 'Test OpenClaw Agent' — COMPOSIO TOOLS section appeared in create form since Composio was enabled
After reload, agent detail shows Composio Tools section with GITHUB_CREATE_ISSUE and GITHUB_CREATE_PR badges (screenshot: openclaw-detail-top.png)
Agent detail page for OpenClaw agent shows 'Composio Tools' section with 'External tools available to this agent via Composio MCP. (Agent-specific selection)' (screenshot: openclaw-detail-top.png)
Agent-level composioTools override (GITHUB_CREATE_ISSUE, GITHUB_CREATE_PR) shown as badges in the Composio Tools section
useAgentComposioTools hook resolves effective tools from adapter_config.composioTools when agent has override, falling back to company-level selected_tools otherwise
Adapter Configuration JSON on detail page shows the full composioTools array proving persistence and availability

frictions: Composio card is the last (17th) in the grid and requires scrolling to reach
